_note: Illustrative example data, not a real production history - this repo has never had real usage. Each entry represents what a reviewer would record after handling a message: did the AI's routing hold up, and (where known) did the account's health score move afterward. This is the raw material calibration_report.py reads to demonstrate how real outcomes would recalibrate the confidence rubric and health-risk thresholds in config.py over time - see the 'Feedback loop' section in HOW_THE_AI_WORKS.md.

tags.reviewer_note: Correctly kept as Service per formal close-account protocol; Success looped in given account size.
Correct - sensitive-topic guardrail fired appropriately on a genuine overcharge/refund request.
Correctly escalated to Team Lead Triage rather than guessed - genuinely ambiguous message.
Correct - content-based override worked as intended despite arriving via the Sales form.
Correctly NOT flagged as sensitive - a near-miss (accidental cross-login), not the real thing.
Correct - retention language correctly routed to Success for proactive outreach.
